MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-14-25 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. COMPLAINT STATES A CAUSE OF ACTION AND ANY FACTUAL ISSUES REGARDING THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WITH SOMEONE TOTHER THAN THE PLAINTIFF ARE NOT PROPERLY RAISED AT A DEMURRER STAGE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) JUDGE: HARRY L. JACOBS ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT ANN GERVASI DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. Complaint states a cause of action and any factual issues regarding the settlement agreement with someone tother than the Plaintiff are not properly raised at a demurrer stage.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Harry L. Jacobs ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
